name: frUpdatePDU
title: frUpdatePDU
syntax: void frUpdatePDU(<PDU var>, dword flags, int updateCounter);
description: This function updates the PDU payload in the assigned FlexRay frames.
The update bit can also be set.

parameters.name: <PDU var>
parameters.description: Name of the variable referenced by the PDU object.

description: The following example assumes that the database defines a PDU that is named PDU_CNT_02 and that this PDU contains a signal that is named counter.
This program sends the PDU once every 64 cycles. The update is made on the beginning of cycle 0.
